name: qa-toolbar-sandbox
description: QA Toolbar Sandbox — rebuilt from the Tampermonkey userscript as a plain HTML/CSS/JS Manifest V3 extension, no build step. Landing page rebuilt separately in apps/landing.

scripts.backend:check: npx --yes deno@latest test --config supabase/functions/deno.json --allow-env supabase/functions/_shared/http_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/admin_mfa_test.ts && npx --yes deno@latest check --config supabase/functions/deno.json supabase/functions/checkout-create-session/index.ts supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts supabase/functions/voucher-redeem/index.ts supabase/functions/referral-track/index.ts supabase/functions/keep-alive/index.ts supabase/functions/access-status/index.ts supabase/functions/admin-email-otp/index.ts
